zh.lifeSummary: 當Amaury I de CRAON於大約1175年出生時，他的父親Maurice de Craon II45歲，母親Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne37歲。他於1212年之前與Jeanne des Roches結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1226年5月15日享年52歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延拉 洛艾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CRAON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Amaury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Chantal, Christophe, Jean-Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Michel, Monique, Phillippe, Sylvanie.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Manuel, Alvaro, Antolin, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Salvador.
French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

en.lifeSummary: When Amaury I de CRAON was born about 1175, his father, Maurice de Craon II, was 45 and his mother, Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne, was 37. He married Jeanne des Roches before 1212. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 15 May 1226, at the age of 52, and was buried in La Roë, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amaury I de CRAON est né environ 1175, son père, Maurice de Craon II, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne des Roches avant 1212. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1226, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à La Roë, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amaury I de CRAON um 1175 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice de Craon II 45 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne 37. Er hat vor 1212 Jeanne des Roches geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Mai 1226 im Alter von 52 Jahren und wurde in La Roë, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury I de CRAON è nato il circa 1175, il suo padre, Maurice de Craon II, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne des Roches prima del 1212. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1226, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a La Roë, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Amaury I de CRAONが約1175年に生まれた時，父Maurice de Craon IIは45歳，母Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenneは37歳であった。1212年以前にJeanne des Rochesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1226年5月15日に52歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラ ロeにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amaury I de CRAON(이)가 대략 1175년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice de Craon II(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1212년 이전 Jeanne des Roches(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1226년 5월 15일 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라 로e에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury I de CRAON nasceu aproximadamente 1175, seu pai, Maurice de Craon II, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne des Roches antes 1212. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1226, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em La Roë, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amaury I de CRAON родился около 1175 г., его отцу по имени Maurice de Craon II было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne des Roches перед 1212 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 мая 1226 г. в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ла роe, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amaury I de CRAON nació aproximadamente 1175, su papá, Maurice de Craon II, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Meulan Dame de Mayenne, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Jeanne des Roches antes de 1212. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1226, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en La Roë, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
